author: IGN YouTube
text:
Sony State of Play - June 2026
State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To kick things off, you’ll get a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15.

#IGN #Gaming #PlayStation

author: IGN YouTube
text:
God of War Laufey - Official Gameplay Reveal (4K) | State of Play 2026
The next entry in the iconic God of War series is on the way. 

This time you play as Laufey (or 'Faye'), Kratos' wife and Atreus' mother. Awakening elsewhere after her body is burned, Faye must discover where she is, and how to get back to her family. 

God of War Laufey is currently in development for PlayStation 5.

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve - Official Deluxe Edition Trailer | State of Play 2026
Take a look the deluxe edition trailer for Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve.

The Federation of Central Usea (FCU) has fallen under the attack by the Republic of Sotoa, and you are left adrift aboard an aging aircraft carrier known as the Endurance. Your mission - reclaim your homeland.

Ace Combat 8: Wings of Theve is releasing on October 2, 2026.

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
No Rest For The Wicked - Official 1.0 Release Date Trailer | State of Play 2026
Moon Studios' No Rest for the Wicked will finally enter Version 1.0 in October 2026 on PC and PS5, and it will feature 100+ hours of content, new powerful weapons, new bosses and enemies, new areas, a re-imagined class system, and much more.

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dune: Awakening - PlayStation Announcement Trailer | State of Play 2026
The Spice must flow in open-world survival RPG, Dune: Awakening.

Discover new technology, uncover the secrets of the Fremen, master the fighting styles of various factions, and survive in the harsh deserts of Arrakis, now with the option for a brand-new single-player mode, when Dune: Awakening comes to PS5 on Sept. 22, 2026.

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

text:
ILL - Official Story Trailer | State of Play 2026

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dynasty Warriors 3 - Complete Edition: Remastered - Official Reveal Trailer | State of Play 2026
Dynasty Warriors fans, rejoice! The beloved PS2 game, Dynasty Warriors 3, is getting a remaster on PlayStation 5!

First released in 2001, players will be able to take part in over 1,000 exciting battles, now fully remastered for the PlayStation 5, even playing as Ziluan from Dynasty Warriors: Origins.

Dynasty Warriors 3 - Complete Edition: Remastered comes to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC via Steam on October 1, 2026.

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Control Resonant - Official Story Release Date Reveal Trailer | State of Play 2026
Jesse Faden fought the Hiss as the newly-christened head of the Federal Bureau of Control, and now her brother has awakened. The Hiss has broken containment, and now their old tool; Dylan Faden, must take the fight to them to save what's left of Manhattan. 

Control: Resonant comes to PS5 on Sept. 24, 2026, and you can pre-order now.

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Bancho the Chef - Wishlist Trailer | State of Play 2026
It takes time to create a masterpiece, and behind every masterpiece is a master that took even longer to mature. Fish, wash dishes, and cook your way to mastery in Bancho the Chef.

Mintrocket is currently developing Bancho the Chef for PlayStation, so wishlist now!

#IGN #Gaming #PS5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Rayman Legends Retold Hands-On Preview: A Remake With 3D Art and 2D Action
I'm not always fond of the constant remaking of games that don't necessarily need a remake, especially if it's not going to be a fundamental rethinking of the source material. And taking a distinct, somewhat whimsical 2D art style and making it denser in 3D doesn't automatically make it look "better" per se. But I think Rayman Legends Retold is just imaginative enough to separate itself from the original.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Stuntman: Hollywood - Official Reveal Trailer | State of Play 2026
Stuntman: Hollywood was revealed at the State of Play showcase and it will let players become Hollywood's "most sought-after stuntman." You'll get to perform scenes inspired by such blockbuster movies as Back to the Future, and show how a little bit of danger can go a long way in Hollywood.
